column1: Fill in your catalog information below. Avoid some of the most common errors by making sure: 1) each row contains an item name; 2) an item and its variations have the same category and description; 3) GTINs are 8,12, 13, or 14 characters and contain numbers only; and 4) every item referencing an option set has both an option set name and an option value.
